# Big Good

> Big Good is the parent ecosystem of email marketing and deliverability products built and operated by ECOMAIL.CZ, s.r.o., a Czech company based in Prague.

## Products

- **Ecomail** — Email marketing platform for businesses of all sizes. Features include campaign creation, automation, segmentation, and analytics.
- **Topol** — Drag-and-drop email template builder. Used by marketers and developers to design responsive HTML emails.
- **DMARCeye** — DMARC monitoring and reporting tool. Helps organizations protect their email domains from spoofing and phishing.
- **Lettr** — Email deliverability and sending infrastructure service.

## Company

ECOMAIL.CZ, s.r.o.
Na příkopě 388/1, Staré Město, 110 00 Praha 1, Czech Republic
IČO: 02762943
Contact: support@ecomail.cz

## Pages

- / — Homepage with overview of the Big Good ecosystem
- /about — About Big Good, the company mission, and the team
- /services — Overview of products and services
- /blog — Blog with articles, product updates, case studies, and analysis
- /news — Latest news from the Big Good ecosystem
- /careers — Open positions and career opportunities
- /contact — Contact form and company information
- /privacy-policy — Privacy policy (Czech, GDPR-compliant)
- /terms-of-service — Terms of service (Czech)
- /cookie-policy — Cookie policy including Google Analytics usage (Czech)

## Content

The blog covers topics including email marketing best practices, product announcements, deliverability analysis, engineering insights, and case studies from the Ecomail, Topol, DMARCeye, and Lettr ecosystems.
